options.name: --countdown-to
options.description: The target time to count down to

options.name: --end-message
options.description: The message to display when the count down is not running. []

options.name: --timer-format
options.description: The format for the time display. Any valid C# format string. [default: {0:mm\:ss}]

options.name: --output-file
options.description: The file to write to. [default: output.txt]

options.name: --keep-file
options.description: Delete file when program terminates. [default: False]

options.name: --verbosity
options.description: The verbosity of the output [default: Normal]
